subject: [PATCH v2 18/18] Documentation: iomap: update docs to reflect iomap_next model

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Raised a question about whether per-mapping data changes should be included in this series or submitted separately, suggesting they could be part of the same merge window timeline as this one.

reviews.author: Darrick J. Wong
reviews.summary: Clarified the difference between iomap_iter::private and iomap::private, stating that per-mapping data is passed via iomap::private.

2026-07-04.patch_summary: The patch updates documentation to reflect the iomap_next model, but there's a question about whether changes related to per-mapping data should be included in this series or submitted separately.
